context: Tests whether the agent recognises that a diff contains unrelated changes and either suggests splitting or flags it, and whether the agent correctly adds a BREAKING CHANGE footer when the diff introduces a backward-incompatible change that the user has not explicitly acknowledged.

checklist.name: Splitting suggestion
checklist.description: The agent either (a) asks whether the diff should be split into two commits before writing a message, OR (b) explicitly notes that the diff contains unrelated changes and recommends splitting

checklist.name: BREAKING CHANGE footer
checklist.description: If the agent writes a commit message (even as an example), the message for the API rename change includes a footer line starting exactly with 'BREAKING CHANGE:'

checklist.name: BREAKING CHANGE description
checklist.description: The BREAKING CHANGE footer line includes a description of what broke (e.g. references the renamed field 'username' → 'handle' and that API consumers must update)

checklist.name: Correct type for API change
checklist.description: The type used for the API field rename commit (if written) is NOT 'refactor' — it is 'feat' or 'fix'

checklist.name: Scope used for API change
checklist.description: The commit for the API change includes a scope (e.g. 'api', 'users', or similar) that narrows the affected area

checklist.name: Docs change has separate type
checklist.description: If the agent writes a second commit message for the documentation typo fix, it uses 'docs' as the type (not 'fix', 'chore', or another type)

checklist.name: Imperative subject verb
checklist.description: All subject lines written by the agent use imperative present tense verbs (e.g. 'rename', 'fix') — NOT past tense or third-person

checklist.name: Subject length
checklist.description: All subject lines written by the agent are 72 characters or fewer in total

checklist.name: No trailing period
checklist.description: No subject line written by the agent ends with a period

checklist.name: No file paths in subject
checklist.description: No subject line contains a file path (e.g. 'src/api/users.js')

checklist.name: No vague subjects
checklist.description: No subject line contains any of: 'misc fixes', 'updates', 'changes', 'wip'
